title: Platform-specific path separator handling
description: Use hardcoded Unix path separators that fail on Windows systems

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect platform-specific path issues

title: Legacy API integration with deprecated endpoints
description: Integrate with third-party API that has deprecated methods causing future breakage

mutation.description: Use deprecated API endpoint that will be removed

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect usage of deprecated APIs

title: Time zone handling bug in date calculations
description: Date arithmetic that doesn't account for daylight saving time transitions

mutation.description: Use naive date calculations ignoring DST transitions

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect timezone-related date calculation errors

title: Unicode handling in string processing
description: String operations that fail with multi-byte Unicode characters

mutation.description: Use byte-based string operations on Unicode text

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect Unicode encoding issues

title: Browser compatibility issue with CSS flexbox
description: Use modern CSS features without fallbacks for older browsers

mutation.description: Add CSS with unsupported properties in legacy browsers

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect browser compatibility issues
